projectDescription: An open-source logging UI for Quickwit that lets you search, filter, visualize, and live-tail logs through a modern web interface.
keyFeatures: Log search and filtering with full-text query support
Live log tailing with real-time streaming
Log frequency histogram with severity distribution
Quick filters — one-click field-value filtering with aggregation counts
Log export to NDJSON, CSV, and plain text
Ingest gateway with bearer token authentication
User management with invite-based access control (admin/user roles)
Google OAuth sign-in with allowed-domain restrictions
Per-index field configuration (level, message, traceback fields)
publicApiSurface: POST /api/ingest/{indexId} — Ingest NDJSON logs with bearer token auth
